tagline: From account research to relevant outreach — in minutes.
overview: Rocketsteer GTM is a sales intelligence platform for outbound teams. Enter a company domain, get a full Account Intelligence Brief in under 60 seconds — so reps stop guessing and start reaching out with real context.

pricing.trial: 14 days free, full Growth access, no credit card needed.

what_you_get_per_brief: Recent trigger events and buying signals

use_cases.sdr_prospecting: Run a domain before your first email — get context, personas, and an outreach angle in seconds.
use_cases.account_prioritization: See which accounts are showing buying signals so your team focuses on the right ones.
use_cases.personalization_at_scale: Every rep sends researched, relevant outreach — at the speed of a template.

differentiators.vs_apollo_zoominfo: They give you contact data. Rocketsteer tells you what to say and why it matters right now.
differentiators.vs_chatgpt: ChatGPT can research a company. Rocketsteer does it in a structured, outbound-ready format and connects to your CRM.
differentiators.core: Most tools aggregate data. Rocketsteer interprets it — the output is clear direction, not a data dump.

policies.refund: Full refund within 7 days of first charge.
policies.support: Starter: email 48hr. Growth: chat 24hr. Team: priority Slack channel.
policies.data: Only public business data is used. SOC 2 Type II compliant.

faqs.how_does_it_work: Enter a company domain. Rocketsteer scans public signals — website, hiring data, news, LinkedIn — and returns a structured brief with outreach direction.
faqs.how_accurate: Briefs are based on public data and meant to give direction, not guarantees. Reps should verify before outreach.
faqs.free_trial: Yes — 14 days free, full Growth plan, no card required.
faqs.languages: English only for now. Multi-language support coming Q3 2025.
